title: Opinion: Opinion | Iran Peace Process Needs A New Architect, And India Shouldn't Waste Its Chance
summary_full: Most leaders in the West have all experienced a sharp drop in popularity owing to economic and geopolitical uncertainty. For Delhi, this might be the time to cash in on its multi-alignment framework and cement its place at the high table.
